library_meta.name: cell-numerics
library_meta.summary: First sample recipe-library. Bundles the cell-mechanics numerics already authored as Form recipes in docs/coherence-substrate/cosine.form and cell-numerics.form. Each recipe carries Form (canonical source), Python (the host implementation in seedbank/local-llm-cell-v0/organ.py), and TypeScript (didactic pseudocode showing how a Rust/Go/TS reader would see it) views. Demonstrates the three-layer architecture from lc-recipes-as-binary-library: lattice → portable library bytes → per-tongue source views.

tongue_caches.python:
def vector_add(a, b):
    return [a[i] + b[i] for i in range(min(len(a), len(b)))]

def matvec(matrix, x):
    return [sum(row[i] * x[i] for i in range(len(x))) for row in matrix]

def pair_cosine(a, b):
    return cosine(a, b)

def pair_angle(a, b):
    return pair_angle(a, b)  # see form_native.py (host acos for CLI parity)

tongue_caches.form: defn dominant_band_delta(a, b) = do { let res = dominant_band_delta(a, b); res };
tongue_caches.python:
def dominant_band_delta(a, b):
    return dominant_band_delta(a, b)  # see form_native.py
